docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $274.99 FILED BY AAA RESTAURANT FIRE CONTROL INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AJANTA CORPORATION DBA GAYLORD INDIA RESTAURANT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-13-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AJANTA CORPORATION DBA GAYLORD INDIA RESTAURANT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AAA RESTAURANT FIRE CONTROL INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AJANTA CORPORATION DBA GAYLORD INDIA RESTAURANT $274.99 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $324.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT AJANTA CORPORATION DBA GAYLORD INDIA RESTAURANT
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $481.99 AS TO DEFENDANT AJANTA CORPORATION DBA GAYLORD INDIA RESTAURANT
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT AJANTA CORPORATION DBA GAYLORD INDIA RESTAURANT
